prompt: 转录这个文件 ~/Downloads/lecture.mp4，语言是中文
expected: 提取音频 → Whisper 转写 → refine_segments 断句 → cleanup 清洗 → raw.srt → 润色确认 → 无翻译（zh detected）→ 输出 _zh.srt

prompt: 把这个英文播客转成双语字幕 ~/Downloads/podcast.wav
expected: Whisper 转写 → refine_segments → cleanup → raw.srt → 润色确认 → 翻译确认（非 zh）→ 中上原下翻译 → 输出 _en_Enhance.srt 或 _en.srt

prompt: 转录这个 3D 教程并润色字幕 ~/Downloads/blender_tutorial.mp4
expected: Whisper 转写 → refine_segments → cleanup → raw.srt → 润色确认 → srt-enhancer（domain_scanner → AI config → 联网校准 → enhance.py --skip refine → 复核 → diff 审核）→ 翻译确认 → 输出 _Enhance.srt
